runtime.dependency_policy: Use packages already installed in conda environment myenv; do not install packages during the loop.
runtime.artifact_dir_policy: Write scripts and artifacts only under the provided round working directory.

evidence.guidance: When visual evidence can help prove, falsify, or explain the conclusion, the proposer should choose task-appropriate plots and include them in the analysis plan. The executor should generate those planned plots when feasible. If plotting libraries are unavailable, generate a simple SVG/CSV-backed diagnostic or explain why no plot was produced.

task.name: numeric_function_discovery
task.goal: Infer a compact mathematical or statistical function/model that describes the observed one-dimensional numeric measurements. Use only the observed data files and loop feedback. Do not assume hidden metadata exists.
